## Summary

<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Type

- [ ] **fix**: Bug fix with reproducible steps or test case
- [ ] **feat**: New feature with test cases covering expected scenarios

## Test Cases

### Required for **feat**
- [ ] Test cases covering expected scenarios
- [ ] Edge cases considered

### Required for **fix**
- [ ] Reproducible steps OR local test case demonstrating the bug

### AI-Generated Tests
- [ ] Unnecessary test cases have been removed

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
